hooks.command: EDITED_FILE=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty') && case "$EDITED_FILE" in *.env*|*credentials*|*secrets*|*.pem|*.key|*.p12) echo '{"decision":"block","reason":"Sensitive file path — confirm with user before writing."}' ;; *) ;; esac

EDITED_FILE=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty') && case "$EDITED_FILE" in */backend/src/simulation/*) echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PostToolUse","additionalContext":"Simulation code edited. Invariants: (1) engine must be importable standalone (no FastAPI / DB imports), (2) numpy arrays documented with shape+dtype+units, (3) no Python loops over frames in hot paths — vectorize or @numba.jit, (4) pytest file exists in backend/tests/simulation/ mirroring this path."}}' ;; */backend/src/models/*) echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PostToolUse","additionalContext":"Pydantic model edited. This is a data contract. Do NOT silently change field names/types. Cross-check: (1) matching ORM row in backend/src/data/orm/, (2) matching test in backend/tests/models/, (3) docs/AUDIO_GLYPH_INFERENCE_MASTER_PLAN.md §3 data contracts still agrees."}}' ;; */backend/src/data/orm/*) echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PostToolUse","additionalContext":"ORM row edited. Must match the paired Pydantic model field-for-field (names + types) and be declared on src/data/orm/base.Base. Migration impact: add an alembic revision if this changes schema."}}' ;; */backend/src/simulation/transforms/*) echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PostToolUse","additionalContext":"Transform family edited. Must implement TransformFamily protocol (name, parameter_space, forward). forward() returns ndarray shape (N,2) dtype=float64 in unit-square [-0.5, 0.5]. Parameters belong in parameter_space(), not as hard-coded literals."}}' ;; *) ;; esac

CHANGED=$(git diff --name-only 2>/dev/null || true) && STAGED=$(git diff --cached --name-only 2>/dev/null || true) && if [ -n "$CHANGED" ] || [ -n "$STAGED" ]; then echo '{"systemMessage":"Uncommitted changes detected. Remember: the user manages git — do not run any mutating git command. Report what changed and suggest a commit message only."}'; fi

echo '{"systemMessage":"SESSION END — MEMORY REVIEW: Before this session closes, review what was learned and suggest memories the user may want to save. Check ~/.codex/memories/-Users-amrambouskila-IMPORTANT-Projects-audio-glyph-inference/memory/MEMORY.md first to avoid duplicates — update existing memories rather than creating new ones when the topic already exists. Memory types: user (role, preferences, knowledge), feedback (corrections given, confirmed approaches — include WHY), project (decisions with external motivation, deadlines, stakeholder context), reference (pointers to external systems). Worth saving: corrections the user gave you, non-obvious approaches they confirmed, project decisions driven by external factors, pointers to external tools/systems, user preferences learned this session. NOT worth saving: anything derivable from code or git history, debugging solutions, ephemeral task details, things already in AGENTS.md. Present a short bulleted list of suggested memories at the end of your response and let the user decide which to save. Memory dir: ~/.codex/memories/-Users-amrambouskila-IMPORTANT-Projects-audio-glyph-inference/memory/"}'
